panel.title: Affiliate panel
panel.subtitle: Share your link, track your referrals, and earn for every active client.

referral.shareWhatsAppText: Check out AlugaPro, the system I use for rental management: {{link}}

commission.description: Your recurring commission is 7% of the monthly fee of every active client you refer.
commission.waitingPeriodNote: Payment only starts after the referred client completes 15 days as an active client.
commission.keepDataUpdated: Keep your payout details up to date so payment is not delayed.

indicate.title: Refer AlugaPro
indicate.description: Introduce the platform to anyone who manages rentals and track each referral here.

share.title: Share
share.description: Send your referral code or link.

trial.title: Free trial
trial.description: Your referral tries AlugaPro for 14 days.

subscribe.title: Subscription
subscribe.description: When the referral subscribes to a paid plan, the referral is confirmed.

earn.title: Get paid
earn.description: After 15 days as an active client, you start receiving 7% recurring commission.

kyc.title: Payout details
kyc.description: To receive your commissions, we need to confirm your identity. We use this data only for validation and payment, according to our Privacy Policy.

fields.pixKeyPlaceholder: CPF, email, phone, or random key
fields.documentPhoto: Photo of ID document (ID card, driver's license, or similar)
fields.documentSelfie: Photo of you holding the document

kyc.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
kyc.validationError: Fill in all fields — CPF, PIX key (and its type), photos and phone — before saving.
kyc.pixPayoutNote: Your commissions are paid via PIX straight to this key — no need to create an account anywhere else.

earnings.emptyDescription: Share your link to start referring and track them here.

commissions.title: Commission statement
commissions.empty: No commissions yet — they show up here for every subscription payment made by your referrals.
commissions.payoutNote: PIX payouts on the 5th of each month, for balances of R$ 20 or more. Smaller balances roll over.
